ctxMarket: Attention is focused on the rapid expansion of onchain derivatives and prediction markets, with new perpetual futures products and tokenized assets emerging on Solana. Institutional and retail interest is being drawn by developments in both financial and sports-related applications.
ctxTalking:
• Kalshi's move to certify perpetual futures for Solana and other altcoins in the U.S.
• Solana Foundation's support for teams building onchain perpetuals and derivatives.
• Growth of tokenized gold and sports industry applications on Solana.
ctxMatters:
New derivatives products could broaden participation and liquidity for Solana-based assets.  
Tokenized gold and sports markets highlight Solana’s push into real-world assets and mainstream entertainment.  
These trends may influence user demand, developer activity, and institutional engagement on the network.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Regulatory filings and foundation support point to a maturing onchain derivatives ecosystem.  
Noise: Speculation about immediate market impact from these launches.
ctxGlossary:
Perpetual Futures — Derivative contracts with no expiry, allowing continuous trading.
Tokenized Gold — Digital tokens representing ownership of physical gold, tradable on blockchain.

readMore.title: Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
Build Fully Onchain Perps on Solana
